description: A customer tries to place an online order, but their credit card payment is declined.

expected_outcome.value: The payment information is sent to the payment gateway.

nodes.task_description: The payment gateway returns a 'declined' response.

expected_outcome.value: The system receives the failed payment notification.

nodes.task_description: The website displays a user-friendly message like 'Your payment was declined. Please try a different card or check your information.'

expected_outcome.value: The customer is clearly informed of the issue and can attempt to correct it without losing the items in their cart.
